top.name: Runic Cascade
top.rules_text: Prepare on tile: when triggered it also prepares a copy of itself on 2 adjacent tiles.

channel.name: Runic Cascade (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Copies trigger immediately on creation

bottom.name: Glyph Warp
bottom.rules_text: Swap positions of 2 prepared tiles (effects move with them).

channel.name: Glyph Warp (Channel)
channel.rules_text: Channel: Also trigger both tiles after swap
